query: (cat:cs.CV OR cat:eess.IV OR cat:cs.AI OR cat:cs.LG OR cat:cs.MM OR cat:stat.ML) AND submittedDate:[202604250000 TO 202604252359]

papers.title: Resource-Constrained UAV-Based Weed Detection for Site-Specific Management on Edge Devices
papers.summary: Weeds compete with crops for light, water, and nutrients, reducing yield and crop quality. Efficient weed detection is essential for site-specific weed management (SSWM). Although deep learning models have been deployed on UAV-based edge systems, a systematic understanding of how different model architectures perform under real-world resource constraints is still lacking. To address this gap, this study proposes a deployment-oriented framework for real-time UAV-based weed detection on resource-constrained edge platforms. The framework integrates UAV data acquisition, model development, and on-device inference, with a focus on balancing detection accuracy and computational efficiency. A diverse set of state-of-the-art object detection models is evaluated, including convolution-based YOLO models (v8-v12) and transformer-based RT-DETR models (v1-v2). Experiments on three edge devices (Jetson Orin Nano, Jetson AGX Xavier, and Jetson AGX Orin) demonstrate clear trade-offs between accuracy and inference latency across models and hardware configurations. Results show that high-capacity models achieve up to 86.9% mAP50 but suffer from high latency, limiting real-time deployment. In contrast, lightweight models achieve 66%-71% mAP50 with significantly lower latency, enabling real-time performance. Among all models, RT-DETRv2-R50-M achieves competitive accuracy (79% mAP50) with improved efficiency, while YOLOv10n provides the fastest inference speed. YOLOv11s and RT-DETRv2-R50-M offer the best balance between accuracy and speed, making them strong candidates for real-time UAV deployment.
papers.title_zh: 基于资源受限的无人机的杂草检测，用于边缘设备上的特定站点管理
papers.summary_zh: 杂草与作物争夺光、水和养分，从而降低产量和作物质量。高效的杂草检测对于特定地点杂草管理 (SSWM) 至关重要。尽管深度学习模型已经部署在基于无人机的边缘系统上，但仍然缺乏对不同模型架构在现实资源限制下如何执行的系统理解。为了解决这一差距，本研究提出了一种面向部署的框架，用于在资源有限的边缘平台上进行基于无人机的实时杂草检测。该框架集成了无人机数据采集、模型开发和设备端推理，重点是平衡检测精度和计算效率。评估了一组不同的最先进的对象检测模型，包括基于卷积的 YOLO 模型 (v8-v12) 和基于 Transformer 的 RT-DETR 模型 (v1-v2)。在三种边缘设备（Jetson Orin Nano、Jetson AGX Xavier 和 Jetson AGX Orin）上进行的实验表明，模型和硬件配置之间的准确性和推理延迟之间存在明显的权衡。结果显示，高容量模型的 mAP50 高达 86.9%，但延迟较高，限制了实时部署。相比之下，轻量级模型可实现 66%-71% mAP50，并且延迟显着降低，从而实现实时性能。在所有模型中，RT-DETRv2-R50-M 实现了具有竞争力的精度（79% mAP50）并提高了效率，而 YOLOv10n 提供了最快的推理速度。 YOLOv11s 和 RT-DETRv2-R50-M 在精度和速度之间提供了最佳平衡，使其成为实时无人机部署的有力候选者。

papers.title: STAND: Semantic Anchoring Constraint with Dual-Granularity Disambiguation for Remote Sensing Image Change Captioning
papers.summary: Remote sensing image change captioning (RSICC) aims to describe the difference between two remote sensing images. While recent methods have explored video modeling, they largely overlook the inherent ambiguities in viewpoint, scale, and prior knowledge, lacking effective constraints on the encoder. In this paper, we present STAND, a Semantic Anchoring Constraint with Dual-Granularity Disambiguation for RSICC, to progressively resolve these ambiguities. Specifically, to establish a reliable feature foundation, we first introduce an interpretable constraint to regularize temporal representations. Operating on these purified features, a dual-granularity disambiguation module resolves spatial uncertainties by coupling macro-level global context aggregation for viewpoint confusion with micro-level frequency-refocused attention for small-object scale enhancement. Ultimately, to translate these visually disambiguated features into precise text, a semantic concept anchoring module leverages language categorical priors to tackle knowledge ambiguity during decoding. Extensive experiments verify the superiority of STAND and its effectiveness in addressing ambiguities.
papers.title_zh: STAND：遥感图像变化字幕的双粒度消歧语义锚定约束
papers.summary_zh: 遥感图像变化字幕（RSICC）旨在描述两幅遥感图像之间的差异。虽然最近的方法已经探索了视频建模，但它们在很大程度上忽略了观点、尺度和先验知识中固有的模糊性，缺乏对编码器的有效约束。在本文中，我们提出了 STAND，一种用于 RSICC 的双粒度消歧语义锚定约束，以逐步解决这些歧义。具体来说，为了建立可靠的特征基础，我们首先引入可解释的约束来规范时间表示。在这些纯化的特征上进行操作，双粒度消歧模块通过将用于视点混淆的宏观层面的全局上下文聚合与用于小对象尺度增强的微观层面的频率重新聚焦注意力相结合来解决空间不确定性。最终，为了将这些视觉上消除歧义的特征翻译成精确的文本，语义概念锚定模块利用语言分类先验来解决解码过程中的知识歧义。大量的实验验证了 STAND 的优越性及其在解决歧义方面的有效性。

papers.title: A satellite foundation model for improved wealth monitoring
papers.summary: Poverty statistics guide social policy, but in many low- and middle-income countries, censuses and household surveys that collect these data are costly, infrequent, quickly outdated, and sometimes error-prone. Satellite imagery offers global coverage and the possibility of predicting economic livelihoods at scale, yet existing approaches to predicting livelihoods with imagery or other non-traditional data often fail to reliably identify local-level variation and, as we show, degrade under temporal shift. Here we introduce Tempov, a satellite foundation model pretrained by self-supervision on three million bi-temporal Landsat pairs and adapted with parameter-efficient fine-tuning to sparse survey labels. The model enables large-scale, high-resolution wealth mapping and dynamic measurement, including zero-shot nowcasting up to a decade after observed labels, retrospective hindcasting, and decadal change tracking, while outperforming existing neural network and geospatial foundation-model baselines. In low-label regimes, Tempov achieves competitive accuracy with only 10% of survey samples, indicating substantially reduced dependence on expensive label collection. The model further generalizes across populous countries within and outside Africa, and scales to a unified Africa-wide model with strong continent-level performance ($R^2=0.63$, $r^2=0.68$), from which we generate high-resolution decadal maps of wealth and wealth changes for the African continent. Analysis of these maps shows large variation in recent economic performance both within and across countries. Our open-source approach provides a pathway to timely, scalable, low-cost monitoring of wealth and poverty from routinely collected satellite data.
papers.title_zh: 用于改进财富监控的卫星基础模型
papers.summary_zh: 贫困统计数据指导社会政策，但在许多低收入和中等收入国家，收集这些数据的人口普查和家庭调查成本高昂、频率低、很快就会过时，有时还容易出错。卫星图像提供了全球覆盖范围和大规模预测经济生计的可能性，但利用图像或其他非传统数据预测生计的现有方法往往无法可靠地识别局部变化，并且正如我们所表明的，在时间变化下会退化。在这里，我们介绍 Tempov，这是一种卫星基础模型，通过对 300 万个双时态陆地卫星对进行自我监督进行预训练，并针对稀疏调查标签进行参数高效微调。该模型能够实现大规模、高分辨率的财富测绘和动态测量，包括观察标签后长达十年的零样本临近预报、回顾性后预报和十年变化跟踪，同时优于现有的神经网络和地理空间基础模型基线。在低标签制度下，Tempov 仅用 10% 的调查样本就实现了有竞争力的准确性，这表明对昂贵标签收集的依赖大大减少。该模型进一步推广了非洲境内外人口众多的国家，并扩展到具有强大大陆水平表现的统一非洲范围模型（$R^2=0.63$，$r^2=0.68$），从中我们生成了非洲大陆财富和财富变化的高分辨率十年地图。对这些地图的分析显示，近期各国内部和各国之间的经济表现存在巨大差异。我们的开源方法提供了一种通过定期收集的卫星数据及时、可扩展、低成本监测财富和贫困的途径。
